shortTerm.title: Moon sextile your Sun
shortTerm.interpretation: A supportive emotional flow helps daily decisions and confidence.

shortTerm.title: Moon sextile your Mercury
shortTerm.interpretation: Clear communication and balanced thinking make this a good planning window.

shortTerm.title: Moon opposition your Saturn
shortTerm.interpretation: Responsibility and emotions can clash. Keep priorities simple and steady.

longTerm.title: Jupiter square your Moon
longTerm.interpretation: Expansion pressures emotional comfort zones and asks for better boundaries.

longTerm.title: Jupiter opposition your Uranus
longTerm.interpretation: Sudden shifts can open new paths if you stay flexible and pragmatic.

longTerm.title: Venus trine your Moon
longTerm.interpretation: A soothing cycle for relationships, home, and creative expression.

eventOfDay.title: Moon opposition your Jupiter
eventOfDay.description: A strong emotional pull meets expansion energy today. Choose grounded action over impulse.
